headline: 'Dune' Leads Weekend US Box Office With $40.1M: What You Need To Know
summary: Denis Villeneuve’s science-fiction epic "Dune" topped the U.S. weekend box office with $40.1 million in ticket sales. However, the film’s commercial success was also a case of whether the proverbial glass was half-full or half-empty.

headline: 8 Stocks To Watch For The NBA's 75th Anniversary Season
summary:
The National Basketball Association kicked off its 75th season Oct. 19 with a doubleheader featuring four of the top teams in the league.

As the NBA season kicks off in full force, here is a look at some of the publicly traded companies that could get a boost from the new season.

headline: Tesla Hikes Price Of Model X, Model S Variants By $5,000
summary: Electric-car maker Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) on Saturday announced a price hike of $5,000 for its Model X Long Range and Model S Long Range vari

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Oct. 24-30): Eyenovia, ANI Pharma, Clearside Medical FDA Decisions, Merck, Bristol-Myers Squibb Earnings, IPOs And More
summary: Biotech stocks posted gains for the second week running, supported by multiple catalysts that included a good start to the big pharma reporting season and broader market strength.

headline: Is Tesla Late To Low-End China EV Party? As XPeng, Volkswagen Now Selling A $25,000 Car In China
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has long been rumored to release a budget model of its EV at the sub-$25,000 price point. With the project yet to come to fruition, rival EV makers are pushing ahead in this cost-competitive segment in China, the hot-and-happening EV market.

headline: Hunting For Scary Movies To Watch This Halloween? Here Are 5 Top-Notch Japanese Horror Films To Consider
summary: Halloween wouldn’t be Halloween without a good old-fashioned horror movie, but why not add a twist this year and watch something different? Here are five cult-classic horror films from Japan to watch to create the perfect scary evening.
